word: G4455 - πώποτε - pṓpote - po'-pot-e - At any time

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: At any time
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4452 and G4218; at any time, that is, (with negative particle) at no time: - at any time, + never (. . . to any man), + yet never man.
